message:
fix(supervision,grpc,cancel): report actual restart count, missing grpc-status, NaN variance

- supervision.rs: RestartBudgetExhausted.total_restarts now reports actual
  restart count from history instead of the configured max_restarts limit.
  Operators can now correctly diagnose supervision behavior.
- grpc/web.rs: missing grpc-status trailer defaults to INTERNAL (13) not
  OK (0). Absent status is a protocol violation per gRPC spec.
- cancel/progress_certificate.rs: NaN variance from inf-inf overflow now
  clamped to 0.0 (f64::max doesn't handle NaN per IEEE 754).
- Fix unused variable clippy errors in 5 files (tracing macro variables).
- plan/fixtures.rs: allow too_many_lines on test helper.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
